headline: Senator Filibuster McBlab Reads Terms And Conditions Of 47 Apps To Delay Lunch
summary: Colleagues now know that 'by using this service, you agree to binding arbitration and also eternal disappointment.'
fullBody: Senator Filibuster McBlab read the terms and conditions of 47 different apps aloud to delay a lunch break. 'Section 47, subsection C,' McBlab droned. 'You agree to share your firstborn child and also your Netflix password.' Colleagues wept openly. 'I just wanted a sandwich,' one whispered. The lunch break was ultimately canceled. McBlab considers it 'a victory for consumer awareness.'
